ayahs.arabic: قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: ق ۚ وَالْقُرْآنِ الْمَجِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaf walqur-ani almajeed
ayahs.translation: Qāf.[1524] By the honored Qur’ān...[1525]

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: بَلْ عَجِبُوا أَن جَاءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ الْكَافِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirunminhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shay-onAAajeeb
ayahs.translation: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing.

ayahs.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَإِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌ بَعِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: A-itha mitna wakunna turabanthalika rajAAun baAAeed
ayahs.translation: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant [i.e., unlikely] return."

ayahs.arabic: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ الْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَابٌ حَفِيظٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusual-ardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeeth
ayahs.translation: We know what the earth diminishes [i.e., consumes] of them, and with Us is a retaining record.

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا بِالْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَاءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِي أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal kaththaboo bilhaqqilamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareej
ayahs.translation: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَاهَا وَزَيَّنَّاهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Afalam yanthuroo ila assama-ifawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannahawama laha min furooj
ayahs.translation: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَاهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَأَنبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ بَهِيجٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wal-arda madadnahawaalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatnafeeha min kulli zawjin baheej
ayahs.translation: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,

ayahs.arabic: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Tabsiratan wathikralikulli AAabdin muneeb
ayahs.translation: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allāh].

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبَـٰرَكًا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً مُّبَارَكًا فَأَنبَتْنَا بِهِ جَنَّاتٍ وَحَبَّ الْحَصِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanazzalna mina assama-imaan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatinwahabba alhaseed
ayahs.translation: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَاتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wannakhla basiqatinlaha talAAun nadeed
ayahs.translation: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -

ayahs.arabic: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ الْخُرُوجُ
ayahs.transliteration: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyaynabihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooj
ayahs.translation: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the emergence [i.e., resurrection].

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَابُ الرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohinwaas-habu arrassi wathamood
ayahs.translation: The people of Noah denied before them,[1526] and the companions of the well[1527] and Thamūd

ayahs.arabic: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٰنُ لُوطٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَانُ لُوطٍ
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAadun wafirAAawnu wa-ikhwanuloot
ayahs.translation: And ʿAad and Pharaoh and the brothers [i.e., people] of Lot

ayahs.arabic: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَأَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ الرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waas-habu al-aykati waqawmutubbaAAin kullun kaththaba arrusula fahaqqawaAAeed
ayahs.translation: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubbaʿ. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِالْخَلْقِ الْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِي لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: AfaAAayeena bilkhalqial-awwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeed
ayahs.translation: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna al-insanawanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabuilayhi min habli alwareed
ayahs.translation: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer[1528] to him than [his] jugular vein.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى الْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ الْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ الشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyaniAAani alyameeni waAAani ashshimali qaAAeed
ayahs.translation: When the two receivers [i.e., recording angels] receive,[1529] seated on the right and on the left.

ayahs.arabic: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yalfithu min qawlinilla ladayhi raqeebun AAateed
ayahs.translation: He [i.e., man] utters no word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَجَاءَتْ سَكْرَةُ الْمَوْتِ بِالْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaat sakratu almawti bilhaqqithalika ma kunta minhu taheed
ayahs.translation: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.

ayahs.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ الْوَعِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanufikha fee assoori thalikayawmu alwaAAeed
ayahs.translation: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَجَاءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَائِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaat kullu nafsin maAAaha sa-iqunwashaheed
ayahs.translation: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.[1530]

ayahs.arabic: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِي غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَاءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ الْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hathafakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasarukaalyawma hadeed
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover,[1531] so your sight, this Day, is sharp."

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَـٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala qareenuhu hatha maladayya AAateed
ayahs.translation: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."

ayahs.arabic: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَلْقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Alqiya fee jahannama kulla kaffarinAAaneed
ayahs.translation: [Allāh will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,

ayahs.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
ayahs.transliteration: MannaAAin lilkhayri muAAtadin mureeb
ayahs.translation: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: الَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِي الْعَذَابِ الشَّدِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahiilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabiashshadeed
ayahs.translation: Who made [as equal] with Allāh another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment."

ayahs.arabic: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَـٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالَ قَرِينُهُ رَبَّنَا مَا أَطْغَيْتُهُ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَالٍ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala qareenuhu rabbana maatghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalinbaAAeed
ayahs.translation: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا لَدَيَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِالْوَعِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala la takhtasimooladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bilwaAAeed
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the threat [i.e., warning].

ayahs.arabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ الْقَوْلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَا أَنَا بِظَلَّامٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wamaana bithallamin lilAAabeed
ayahs.translation: The word [i.e., decree] will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ امْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtala/tiwataqoolu hal min mazeed
ayahs.translation: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more,"

ayahs.arabic: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَأُزْلِفَتِ الْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena ghayrabaAAeed
ayahs.translation: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,

ayahs.arabic: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatha ma tooAAadoona likulliawwabin hafeeth
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allāh] and keeper [of His covenant].

ayahs.arabic: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَّنْ خَشِيَ الرَّحْمَٰنَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَجَاءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Man khashiya arrahmanabilghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneeb
ayahs.translation: Who feared the Most Merciful in the unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].

ayahs.arabic: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: ادْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَامٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ الْخُلُودِ
ayahs.transliteration: Odkhulooha bisalamin thalikayawmu alkhulood
ayahs.translation: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."

ayahs.arabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَاءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Lahum ma yashaoona feehawaladayna mazeed
ayahs.translation: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا فِي الْبِلَادِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin humashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi halmin mahees
ayahs.translation: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape?

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى السَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika lathikraliman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa assamAAawahuwa shaheed
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna assamawatiwal-arda wama baynahuma fee sittatiayyamin wama massana min lughoob
ayahs.translation: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ الْغُرُوبِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fasbir AAala mayaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAiashshamsi waqabla alghuroob
ayahs.translation: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,

ayahs.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَارَ السُّجُودِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wamina allayli fasabbihhu waadbaraassujood
ayahs.translation: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration [i.e., prayer].

ayahs.arabic: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَاسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ الْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
ayahs.transliteration: WastamiAA yawma yunadi almunadimin makanin qareeb
ayahs.translation: And listen on the Day when the Caller[1532] will call out from a place that is near -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ الصَّيْحَةَ بِالْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ الْخُرُوجِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yasmaAAoona assayhatabilhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooj
ayahs.translation: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves].

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْيِي وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا الْمَصِيرُ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu nuhyeewanumeetu wa-ilayna almaseer
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ الْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma tashaqqaqu al-ardu AAanhum siraAAanthalika hashrun AAalayna yaseer
ayahs.translation: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us.

ayahs.arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَا أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloonawama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bilqur-animan yakhafu waAAeed
ayahs.translation: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant.[1533] But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.
